primary_focus: trace-collector and proposal-applier updates for exploration mode

changes: Added 'exploration' trace type routing to traces/exploration/ directory
Added collectExplorationTraces() function for active exploration gradient monitoring
Added exploration gradient state injection (reads grao-state.json exploration gradients)
Updated collectAllTraces() to include exploration trace collection
Added --exploration flag to CLI for on-demand exploration trace collection
trace_collector.rationale: Exploration traces are distinct from research/agent traces — they track active hypothesis testing, not passive observation

changes: Lowered exploration proposal confidence threshold from 0.60 to 0.30 (per POLICY-SATURATION-BREAKOUT spec)
Added --exploration-only flag to apply only exploration proposals
Added exploration proposal result tracking (track rounds_to_verify countdown)
Added exploration area registry update on apply (prevent re-proposing failed areas)
Fixed status display to show exploration type indicator (🧭) in all status outputs
Added exploration proposal archival on expiry (rounds_to_verify exhausted without result)
proposal_applier.rationale: Exploration proposals have lower confidence by design; applying reinforcement thresholds would suppress all exploration work

top_proposals.hypothesis: Trace-collection-enhancement gradient confirms: adding exploration trace type routing reduces signal noise in research traces.
Research-domain-expansion gradient: arxiv citation diversity increased after adding cross-domain routing. Testing whether broader domain coverage improves gradient quality.

key_finding: Infrastructure updates complete. trace-collector now routes exploration traces to dedicated directory, preventing signal contamination in research and agent traces. proposal-applier now applies exploration proposals at 0.30 confidence threshold. 2 additional TPG targets added. Round 44 marks full exploration-mode infrastructure completion.
action_needed: Monitor cross-cluster-optimization for 2 more rounds (rounds 45, 46) to confirm 1.3x amplification signal. Archive exploration proposals that reach zero rounds_to_verify without results.
implementation_changes: proposal-applier.js: exploration confidence threshold 0.30, archival logic added (GHO-44-pa-update)
